properties.name: SEPA CleanAir@School Programme
properties.geography: East Renfrewshire, North Lanarkshire, Glasgow (schools across Scotland)
properties.owner: SEPA / local authorities (East Renfrewshire Council, North Lanarkshire Council)

properties.name: Stirlingshire Villages Project
properties.geography: Stirlingshire villages: Aberfoyle, Doune, Deanston, Fintry, Kippen, Thornhill
properties.scale: Lamppost-mounted monitors + resident-deployed portable sensors (6 villages)
properties.owner: University of Stirling / SEPA / Stirling Council
properties.sensor: Lamppost-mounted LCS + portable PM sensors (loaned to residents)
properties.goals: Community empowerment; rural AQ evidence; solid fuel burning detection; behaviour change in villages

properties.name: Forth-ERA (air quality component)
properties.scale: AQ sensors within 1,000+ sensor digital observatory
properties.owner: University of Stirling / SEPA / Stirling & Clackmannanshire councils
properties.goals: Catchment-scale digital observatory; real-time environmental monitoring; 'living laboratory' for Forth region

properties.name: Scotland LEZ Monitoring (Glasgow, Edinburgh, Dundee, Aberdeen)

properties.goals: LEZ compliance monitoring and evaluation; evidence for Scotland's 4 LEZs (enforcement 2023-2024)

properties.name: Belfast City Council (Zephyr Assessment)
properties.goals: Detailed AQ assessment; emissions inventory; dispersion modelling input
